name: 分数/小数/百分数
subject: math
curriculum_points: Candidates should give non-exact numerical answers correct to 3 significant figures, or 1 decimal place for angles in degrees, unless a different level of accuracy is specified in the question.

To earn accuracy marks, candidates should avoid rounding figures until they have their final answer. Where candidates need to use a final answer in later parts of the question, they should use the value of the final answer before it was rounded.
